problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: Combining Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
